items.title: Websudoku Update: The Lichess of Sudoku
items.body: Websudoku has been updated so users can now send reuqests to other users via signing in. It it is a simple sign in that is untraceable and does not involve your google account. You can play a game of sudoku with the player you send a request to. Also, the old multiplayer has been turned into a wild card multiplayer, where you can play with a random player.

items.title: Smiggles OS Development
items.body: Lately, the Nixon Incorporated team has been working on our most ambitious project, Smiggles. Smiggles is an 11,000+ line lightweight operating system that we are developing from sratch. At 1.44 MB, smiggles is a pretty light operating system. If you want to stay updated or take a look at the source code for Smiggles OS, take a look at our github repository and check the official Nixon Incorporated bulletin for more updates.
